title: Cathepsin S regulates germinal center reactions and anti-tumor humoral responses.
snippet: B cells mature into antibody-secreting cells by antigen processing and presentation and undergo productive germinal center (GC) reactions in secondary lymphoid organs. In solid tumors, antigen presentation and local anti-tumor humoral immunity can arise through the formation of GC-like tertiary lymphoid structures (TLS). Here, we show that cathepsin S activ...
